question: Change the status of the Los Angeles flight to 'CANCELLED' and make the font color red to make it more noticeable.
This sign has the wrong street name - change "OAK ST N" to "WESTBOROUGH AVE W", and update the district to "DOWNTOWN (Dist. 3)" to match.
Change the book title to 'The Art of Potion-Making' and replace the author name with 'S. Snape', maintaining the embossed gold foil texture and its reflective qualities.
Change 'Tony's Deli' to 'Tony's Cafe', and change the date on the advertisement board to 'August 1st - August 31st'
There seem to be a few spelling mistakes on this bulletin board. Find and correct all of them.
Swap the names for Wednesday and Thursday on the duty roster, and change 'Dream Big' on the banner to 'Aim Higher'
Redesign the menu layout by merging Starters and Soups & Salads into one column, keeping Mains as its own column, and Sides as its own column — a three-column layout
Remove 'Memorial Hospital' from the Route 42 station list, then add a new stop called 'Civic Center' between 'Sports Arena' and 'City Hall'
Change 'Sports & Outdoors' on the Level 3 sign to 'Bags & Accessories', change the banner to say '10TH ANNIVERSARY' instead of '5TH', and extend the points expiration date to June 30, 2025

Change the green italic sans-serif text in the second section to match the white serif capitals of the first section. Also update the project end date on the information board from September 2025 to March 2026.
Change train 6789 to show on-time operation with status 'On Time', and change train 892's platform from 12 to 8
Change the company name to 'RAPIDEX FREIGHT', change the phone number to 1-800-727-4339, change the website to www.rapidexfreight.com, keep all other advertising text unchanged
Strike through all original prices with red lines and write the new 20% off prices next to them in red marker
The banner contains a logical error. Please fix it.
Change all instances of '2024' to '2025', replace sponsor 'BANK OF AMERICA' with 'CHASE BANK', and change 'NIKE' to 'ADIDAS'

Please make three small edits: 1) In the LED queue display's scrolling ticker at the bottom, change 'one (1) photocopy' to 'two (2) photocopies'; 2) On the right-side poster under 'SERVICE GUIDELINES', correct the misspelled subheading 'PROCEEDURES' to the proper spelling; 3) Change the lightbox above window 03 from 'LICENSE RENEWAL 03' to 'EMPLOYMENT SERVICES 03', ensuring the glowing blue-background/white-text effect, letter spacing, and alignment match the other windows exactly.

Change Rule 7 on the yellow '10 SHOP FLOOR SAFETY RULES' sign from 'Report hazards to shift supervisor immediately; do not attempt repairs.' to '7. Report hazards to the Safety Lead immediately and log in the work order system.' The font weight and the period at the end must remain consistent with the other rules. Also change '5 mph' in Rule 6 to '8 mph', ensuring the 'mph' abbreviation spacing and letter proportions are not stretched or distorted. On the 'EMERGENCY CONTACTS' board, change 'First Aid: (555) 234-1002' to 'First Aid: (555) 234-1020', leaving all other numbers unchanged. Finally, on the two inspection logs clipped below the sign, change 'Inspector: J. Lin' on the first log to 'Inspector: J. Lynn' and change 'Inspector: J. Lin' on the second log to 'Inspector: K. Woods'.

Make the following text changes: 1) On the overhead banner, change 'Save $30' to 'Save $40' in 'Back-to-School Sale! Spend $199, Save $30'—keep all other text intact and ensure the white lettering maintains consistent stroke weight and crisp edges against the red fabric; 2) On the left yellow price tag, correct 'Stapels' to 'Staples', leaving '24/6 (1000 ct)  $5.80' unchanged; 3) On the blue hardcover planner, change '2026 PLANNER' to '2027 PLANNER' and replace 'Weekly Planner' with 'Agenda Hebdomadaire'—the replacement text must match the silver foil-embossed style, with proper positioning, kerning, and line spacing preserved; 4) On the circular sticker on the shrink-wrapped pen package, change 'Buy 2 Get 1 FREE' to '2nd Item 50% Off', keeping the text centered within the circular sticker and naturally conforming to the curved plastic surface.

I want to make the reading area signage English-only: 1) In the "Library Guidelines" poster, change rule #2 from "30 minutes" to "15 minutes"—the entire paragraph must remain fully justified with consistent line spacing (text must not overflow the poster margins); 2) On the wall-mounted acrylic sign, keep only "Reading Room" and remove the Spanish line "Sala de Lectura" below it, using content-aware fill to restore the navy blue background cleanly and naturally (as if no text was ever printed there); 3) On the table tent, change "Please silence your phone" to "Please silence your phone or set to vibrate"—the added "or set to vibrate" must match the original text's exact gray tone, font, and weight; 4) On the green shelf strip, remove the Spanish "Nuevas Adquisiciones" and keep only "New Arrivals", without damaging the strip's edges or shadow.

Update the text in this classroom photo as follows: On the chalkboard, change only 'Lecture 3' to 'Lecture 4' in the top title—leave 'Data Structures & Algorithms' and 'Sorting' untouched; in the bottom-right homework corner, change 'HW: Ch.5, Problems 3–5, 3–6' to 'HW: Ch.6, Problems 3–7, 3–8', preserving the natural chalk texture with grain and dust marks; on the projected PPT, change bullet point 3 from 'Complexity: O(n²) (using Quicksort as example)' to 'Complexity: O(n log n) (Quicksort average-case)', maintaining the original PPT font, size, bullet alignment, and the bluish projection color cast. Do not modify any other text.

Correct the plaque information as follows: 1) In the English title 'Bronze Ewer (Replica)', change '(Replica)' to '(Reconstruction)'; 2) In the English description, change 'completed in 1998' to 'completed in 1996', leaving all other text intact; 3) In the French title, change '(Réplique)' to '(Reconstitution)'; 4) In the French paragraph, change 'Restauré en 1998' to 'Restauré en 1996'. Requirements: the engraved/printed metallic finish of the plaque, letter spacing, text alignment, and glass reflections must all appear natural—as though the plaque was always printed this way. The accession number '2A-017' must remain exactly unchanged.

Change the personal information on the shipping label to a redacted version: 'Recipient: Christopher Reynolds' becomes 'Recipient: John D**'; 'Phone: (415) 555-0147' becomes 'Phone: (415) 555-0000'; change the entire address line to 'Address: XXXX Westfield Boulevard, Apt. XXXX, San Francisco, CA', keep 'ZIP: 94102' unchanged. Then change the note 'Leave at front door' to 'Leave at reception desk'. Also change the side label 'Pkg 1 of 3' to 'Pkg 2 of 3'. Requirements: The barcode and the number '1Z-01987-20260213' beneath it must absolutely not be altered or distorted; paper wrinkles, tape reflections, and print grayscale must remain consistent, making the edited label look as if it was originally printed that way (use cloning/healing to cleanly process the edges of edits).

Change the left reagent bottle's label to a new formulation: replace 'Anhydrous Ethanol / 99.7% AR / Prep Date: 2026-02-05' with three lines 'Ethanol / 75% (v/v) / Prep Date: 2026-02-14', maintaining the same label paper texture, curling edges, and curved bottle perspective; simultaneously update the lab notebook by changing the handwritten date from '2026-02-12' to '2026-02-14', 'Sample: A-03' to 'Sample: A-08', and 'Volume: 50 mL' to 'Volume: 30 mL', ensuring consistent pen stroke thickness as if written by the same person. Do not modify labels on the other bottles or the warning sign text.

Please update the recreation center bulletin board: On the right-side electronic display, change the first line from 'TODAY'S HOURS 6:30AM-10:00PM' to 'TODAY'S HOURS 7:00AM-9:30PM', and translate the second line from Spanish 'POR FAVOR RESPETE EL EQUIPO' to English 'PLEASE RESPECT ALL EQUIPMENT'—both lines must retain the electronic display's black-and-white pixel font aesthetic and horizontal alignment. In the left-side schedule table, swap the two Wednesday cells: change the '6:00-7:00 PM' Wednesday cell from 'Class' to 'Open', and change the '7:00-8:00 PM' Wednesday cell from 'Open' to 'Class', keeping table gridlines intact with centered text and consistent row height. In the rules text, change 'Auto-cancel after 10 min late' to 'Auto-cancel after 5 min late', ensuring the entire paragraph still wraps naturally within its original layout. All other content must remain unchanged.

Update the intersection information as follows: 1) Change the green directional sign from "East Ring Rd →" to "East Ring Blvd →", keeping the arrow direction and reflective green background material effect intact; 2) On the construction notice board, change "Construction Period: Feb 15, 2026 – Mar 30, 2026" to "Construction Period: Feb 15, 2026 – Apr 10, 2026", maintaining the original line spacing and character kerning as if it were originally printed that way; 3) Change the red banner text from "SAFETY FIRST – EVERYONE'S DUTY" to "SAFETY FIRST – OUR SHARED DUTY", preserving the fabric wrinkles and cast shadows on the banner cloth. Do not distort or corrupt the red circular "DEPT. OF PUBLIC WORKS" stamp.

Please update the production records as follows: 1) In the screen's spreadsheet, only modify Row 2 (SMT-02)—change the defect rate from '1.8%' to '0.8%' and change the notes from 'Pending review' to 'Verified'; do NOT modify Row 1 (SMT-01) which also shows '0.8%'; 2) Change the status bar from 'Updated: 02/13/2026 6:42 PM' to 'Updated: 02/14/2026 9:15 AM', while preserving the screen's moiré pattern and backlit glow; 3) On the paper 'First Article Inspection' form, change 'Date: 02/13/2026' to 'Date: 02/14/2026', and correct the typo 'Inspetor: J. Parker' to 'Inspector: J. Parker'—leave all other fields (Part No., Work Order, Result, signature) unchanged.

Update several text elements on the transit route board: (1) In Route 203's stop list, change 'City Library' to 'Arts Center' – only this stop name, keeping all other stops and their sequence unchanged; (2) In the same list, change 'Central Park (Metro Link)' to 'Central Park [Metro-Link]' – the text must remain on a single line with consistent alignment and proper kerning around the square brackets and hyphen; (3) In the fare table, change the column header 'Transit Card' to 'Smart Card' – the table gridlines, numeric values, and column alignment must remain unchanged. Requirements: The information board has a printed and laminated finish; all edits must appear factory-printed with no jagged edges, color shifts, or misalignment.

Modify the signage on the laboratory door as follows: 1) Change the room placard from 'B-407' to 'B-417', keeping the same font size and blue-and-white style; 2) In the 'LAB ENTRY REQUIREMENTS' notice, add a new line 3 reading '3. All Visitors Must Register at Front Desk' below line 2, then renumber the original lines 3 and 4 to become lines 4 and 5 (keeping their text unchanged), ensuring uniform line spacing and aligned numbering throughout; 3) On the small black sticker above the card reader, replace 'BADGE SCAN' with 'TAP TO ACCESS', maintaining white text centered on the black background and preserving the worn edges of the sticker. Do not modify any other text (emergency number, exit arrow, doorbell).

Modify the top 'DESIGN REVIEW' magazine cover to the next month's version: 1) Change 'March 2026 Issue' in the top-left corner to 'April 2026 Issue', keeping the same position; 2) Change the central main headline from 'Cover Story: The True Cost of Sustainable Materials' to 'Cover Story: The Hidden Cost of Sustainable Materials', and make this line slightly larger (but still within the original layout margins without encroaching on the sub-headlines); 3) In the left-side feature title 'Toolkit: 12 Comon Pitfalls of Layout Grids', correct the typo 'Comon' to 'Common', changing nothing else; 4) Do not alter the barcode number '9771001234005' or the website 'www.designreview.example.com'. Requirements: Preserve the magazine cover's print halftone texture, subtle paper grain, and specular highlights. Typography style must remain consistent—the edit should be undetectable.

Ophthalmology should actually be on the third floor—move it there from the fourth floor. Change the waiting count on the queue display for Internal Medicine to 18 patients. Also, can you change the 'Laboratory' wayfinding line from blue to yellow?

Sarah is taking leave next week; replace all her Yoga classes with Emma as substitute, and change the color from purple to blue accordingly. Update the Annual rate to $259.99 and add a strikethrough on the original $299.99 to show the discount.

Swap the conferences between Ballroom A and B – move the AI Summit to Ballroom B and the Roundtable to Ballroom A, but keep the times with their original rooms, don't change those. Also change the date to December 5th. Should the directional arrow signs on the sides of the corridor be swapped too? Actually, never mind, leave those as they are

Update the days without incident to 1290. There's an error in procedure #2 - 'Insure' should be 'Ensure'. Change David Miller's team designation from 'Lathe Team' to 'CNC Team'. Also the hazard numbers need updating - Corrected should be 11 and In Progress should be 1

Change the box office figure on the Inside Out 3 poster from '$1.4 Billion' to '$1.5 Billion'. On the showtimes board, reduce the IMAX 3D price in Theater 3 row from '$19.50' to '$17.50', and change Theater 4's status from 'Starting Soon' to 'In Progress'. Update Combo A price on the concession menu from '$18.99' to '$21.99'.
Change all prices that end in 8 to end in 9 instead—for example, $2.98 becomes $2.99. Don't modify the others. Check the promotional area prices too.
